summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of 月光之境档案馆 (Moonlight Archive) fixes. All 8 requested features are working correctly: fixed sidebar, reading progress bar, summary mode toggle, force graph improvements, and character page scrolling.
passed_tests: Fixed sidebar in content page - sidebar stays fixed while content scrolls independently
Reading progress bar on right side - positioned absolutely with proper styling
Reading progress percentage at bottom - displays current reading progress
Summary mode toggle - switches between 完整对话 and 仅摘要 modes
Summary mode scene expansion - click scenes to expand/collapse dialogue
Force-directed graph size - increased to 850px height for better visibility
Force graph zoom controls - zoom in, zoom out, and fit view buttons all functional
Character page list scrolling - supports mouse hover scrolling with 9676px scroll height
